core.execution.tests.run_experiment module

REAL EXPERIMENT – Run statistically significant experiments

core.execution.tests.run_experiment.display_master_summary(all_results)[source]

Display final summary table.

core.execution.tests.run_experiment.main()[source]

Main entry point - minimal logic.

core.execution.tests.run_experiment.parse_arguments()[source]

Parse command line arguments.

core.execution.tests.run_experiment.run_all_experiments(args)[source]

Run all tasks with all providers. Returns list of all results.

core.execution.tests.run_experiment.run_provider_task(harness, runner, task, provider, repetitions, cool_down, args, config)[source]

Run all repetitions for ONE provider-task combination. Returns stats dict or None if failed.

Parameters:

  • harness – ExperimentHarness instance

  • runner – ExperimentRunner instance

  • task – Task dictionary

  • provider – Provider name

  • repetitions – Number of repetitions

  • cool_down – Cool down seconds

  • args – Command line arguments

  • config – ConfigLoader instance

core.execution.tests.run_experiment.run_task(harness, runner, task, providers, repetitions, cool_down, args, config)[source]

Run one task across all providers. Returns list of stats for each provider.
